name: Harbour Medical Centre
cancellation_policy: Please provide 24 hours notice for cancellations. Late cancellations may incur a $50 fee.
after_hours: For after-hours emergencies, please call 000 or visit your nearest emergency department.
telehealth_info: Telehealth appointments available via our patient portal. Link sent via SMS before appointment.
billing_info: We accept Medicare bulk billing for concession card holders. Standard consultation gap: $38. Payment due within 14 days.
parking: 2-hour street parking available on Circular Quay West. Nearest parking garage: Cahill Expressway Car Park.
